vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

requirements.description: Provide a motor mount with a bolt circle for a pusher prop.
Ensure cooling airflow through the cooling inlet to the motor pod.
Include an equipment bay door for access to internal components.

verify.value: All required fields present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields are included.
Ensure the mass estimate matches the expected value.

verify.value: All features in part_tree are referenced in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each feature in part_tree should correspond to explicit geometry.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal and clearly defined.
verify.rule: Interfaces should be mutual and specify DOF, clearance, and required features.

verify.value: Visible locking methods and preload intents are specified.
verify.rule: Critical joints must show locking and preload details.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to different materials (EPP and CFRP).
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion coefficients to predict and mitigate potential mismatches.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow if cooling inlet is obstructed.
risk.mit: Include multiple cooling paths and ensure unobstructed access to cooling inlet.

risk.desc: Structural integrity compromised if spar attachment flanges are improperly aligned.
risk.mit: Implement strict alignment tolerances and visual inspection during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of fastener failure due to inadequate engagement length or preload.
risk.mit: Specify minimum engagement lengths and preload torques in assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect the accuracy of FDM parts, especially in thin sections.
risk.mit: Use support structures and post-processing techniques to enhance part accuracy.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

Wing spars transfer loads from wingtips to motor pod
Equipment bay door provides access to internal components

integration_opportunities.opportunity: integrate motor mount with cooling inlet
align equipment bay door with spar attachment flanges

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection of bolt patterns and cooling paths

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to complex assembly order.
risk.mit: Review and optimize assembly order hints.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance in snap-fit interfaces.

risk.mit: Include thermal expansion considerations in design.

risk.mit: Design access cover to ensure easy removal and reinstallation.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of detailed fastener locking instructions.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions including torque settings and locking methods.

risk.desc: Insufficient cooling airflow may lead to overheating if cooling duct dimensions are not optimized.
risk.mit: Conduct CFD analysis to optimize cooling duct dimensions and ensure adequate airflow.

risk.desc: Inadequate service access may hinder maintenance if inspection windows are not properly sized.
risk.mit: Increase size of inspection windows to ensure easy access for maintenance tasks.

risk.desc: Structural integrity could be compromised if mounting flanges are not adequately reinforced.
risk.mit: Add reinforcement ribs to mounting flanges to improve structural strength.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may cause issues if thermal management is not considered in the design.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion gaps and use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.
